title: Balala The Fairies Ocean Magic
titleRomaji: Balala Xiao Moxian: Mofa Hai Ying Bao
titleNative: 巴啦啦小魔仙之魔法海萤堡
synopsis: In the magical underwater world, there is a mysterious and charming place called Hai Ying Bao, a.k.a. the Ocean Castle. When human girls Ling Haixin and Xia Fan accidentally met the Princess of the Icy Blue City, Na Xiya, they transform from ordinary girls into magic fairies. Together with Xiya, they protect the human world and the sea world, helping her investigate who is polluting the ocean. (Source: Balala the Fairies Wiki, edited)

title: Hakata Mentai! Pirikarako-chan
titleNative: 博多明太！ぴりからこちゃん
synopsis: Hakata Mentai! Pirikarako-chan is set in a mysterious shopping center in a town that is like but also not quite like Hakata. In this setting, a walleye pollack roe fairy named Pirikarako-chan rushes about every day trying to ease the worries and solve the rumors of the other food fairies. (Source: Crunchyroll)

titleEnglish: Kai: Legend of the Icy Lake
titleNative: 카이: 거울 호수의 전설
synopsis: After narrowly escaping a horrific avalanche Kai searches for his missing brother Shamui. To find him, Kai must cros the dangerous Icy Lake ruled by Snow Queen Hattan.

title: Ranma 1/2: Tendou-ke no Oyobidenai Yatsura!
titleNative: らんま1/2 天道家のおよびでない奴ら!
synonyms: Ranma 1/2: Tendo Family and Those Other Guys!
synopsis: Features Nabiki Tendo reviewing the series, where she discusses various characters that the Tendo family has had to tolerate. Includes new animation of Nabiki hanging around the house, taking a bath, and wondering about the true identity of P-chan. Was only available through the Kitty Animation Circle. ( Edited source: furinkan.com/ranma/anime/specials.html)

title: Cybuster
titleNative: 魔装機神サイバスター
synopsis: In an enviromentally wrecked future Tokyo, a young man named Ken Ando joins an organization called DC. Little does he realize that his fate and that of Earth will be linked to a mysterious mecha from another world. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Kyoshin to Hyouka no Shiro
titleNative: 巨神と氷華の城
synopsis: The story is set in Nagasaki prefecture in Minami Shimabara city, the fabled origin of the Shimabara Rebellion that sent shockwaves through all of Japan in the early Edo period. It is also where a third-year junior high school student named Shirou spends his days with his school friends. One summer day, Shirou's older childhood friend Akane returns to Minami Shimabara from Tokyo. Shirou and Akane take a stroll around Minami Shimabara with another longtime friend, Tokiya. While these friends are dealing with nostalgia and more complex feelings, a mysterious creature named Goron suddenly appears before them. This encounter with a mere little creature causes great events to unfold once more in this city... (Source: Anime News Network)

synopsis: Feena Fam Earthlight will have you seeing stars! It's hard enough being from the Moon, but it's even harder when you're in love with an Earthling! Watch as two worlds collide when this space princess makes her landing on Earth! (Source: HIDIVE)

title: Kiratto Pri☆Chan Season 3
titleNative: キラッとプリ☆チャン シーズン3
synopsis: The new Pri☆Chan Land amusement park has opened near the Prism Stone shop. It is a semi-virtual world where the mascots of idol teams come to life, and even perform as idols themselves. Park manager Meganii announces the Illuminage tournament, where idols compete to become princesses of each area of Pri☆Chan Land, and at the finale one team will be chosen as Illuminage Queens. With the help of their mascots, Miracle☆Kiratts, Meltic StAr and other teams compete to become the Illuminage Queens. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Flowering Heart
titleNative: 플라워링하트
synonyms: フラワーリングハート
synopsis: A special magical story of an ordinary girl! Ari is a fifth grade student who transform into adult with a variety of magical powers to solve problems of everyday life. One day, going to home Ari discovers a strange hamster and ring. She collects hope energy on earth helping the others to save the Flowering Kingdom people of the despair energy. (Source: Mahou Shoujo Wikia)

title: Aria the Scarlet Ammo Special
titleRomaji: Hidan no Aria - Butei ga Kitarite Onsen Kenshuu
titleNative: 緋弾のアリア 武偵が来たりて温泉研修
synonyms: Aria the Scarlet Ammo - Butei's Going on a Hot Spring Training Camp
synopsis: The story takes place in Tokyo Butei High School, a special school where armed detectives — "Butei" — are trained to use weapons. Kinji Tooyama is a second-year-student who has a special ability, but he keeps it a secret to maintain an ordinary, peaceful life. However, when he gets caught in a bombing on the way to school, he encounters H. Aria Kanzaki, the most powerful S-Rank Butei student in Assault Studies. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: LBX Girls
titleNative: 装甲娘戦機
synonyms: สาวเกราะกู้โลก!
synopsis: In an unplanned field trip, Riko is transported to an alternate Japan where metal-based life forms known as Mimesis ravage the world. Only girls equipped with LBX armored weaponry can stand up to this scourge. Joined by four other displaced young women, Riko will have to adapt to save humanity. The hope of a planet now rests on these heavy metal soldiers who desire one wish—to return home again! (Source: Funimation)

title: Daigo of Fire Company
titleRomaji: Megumi no Daigo: Kajiba no Baka Yarou
titleNative: め組の大吾 火事場のバカヤロー
synopsis: Daigo Asahina is Medaka Gumi #2's/Me Gumi's new rookie firefighter, and already he's done crazy things, like throwing people off of a rooftop to save them from an explosion. He had good intentions, but his deeds are starting to hurt the company's reputation. At Sengoku City's Concert Hall, a fire breaks, and the some Emergency Rescue Squad needs rescuing. Daigo will do all he can to keep his promise: Not to let anyone die on the job. (Source: Anime News Network)
